models.sample: In a double-entry ERP system, every journal entry must have total debits equal to total credits before posting to ensure that the accounting equation (Assets = Liabilities + Equity

roleDecision.deepseek-r1:14b: Reasoning/planner-and-review second opinion (chain-of-thought planning, design critique).
roleDecision.qwen2.5-coder:14b: PRIMARY code-oriented proposer/reviewer for catalog-entity proposals (coder-tuned; deterministic templates still write the committed code under governance).
roleDecision.authority: Local models are REVIEWERS/PLANNERS/PROPOSERS ONLY. Deterministic generator templates write all committed product code. Every LLM proposal passes the collision/hallucination/reserved-name guard before use.

honesty: Both models responded locally (no internet). This eval informs role assignment only; it does not let a model write committed code unguarded.
